description: Vidyai is an open-source, AI-driven learning platform for school and college students that makes education interactive, accessible, and emotionally adaptive. It features voice-based navigation, a gamified ecosystem with flashcards and quizzes, and an affective learning engine that tracks student focus/stress to suggest custom learning paths or timely breaks. With our MVP ready, our goal for SSOC '26 is to scale this into a fully operational, production-ready platform.
